hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *progress-tracker.md) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"context/progress-tracker.md was just updated, which signals a feature is complete. Run the /review skill now to verify the feature against the plan, architecture, and design standards before moving on."}}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
